title: physaria spatulata
intro: Physaria spatulata, also known as Spurred Phacelia, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Physaria spatulata include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Physaria spatulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
